commands.review_summary:
The branch passes a source config to the security-audit stored-secret collector, changes `openclaw security audit` to read `getRuntimeConfigSourceSnapshot()`, and adds direct audit regression tests for env-ref suppression and plaintext warnings.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +59. Total +64 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. `resolveConfigForRead` substitutes `${ENV}` before `ConfigFileSnapshot.sourceConfig` is stored, and this PR reads that snapshot at `openclaw security audit`, so a real env-backed config can still reach the collector as the resolved secret.

target.title: fix(security): avoid false-positive secret findings when config uses env references
target.body:
<!--
Closes #62438
-->

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where `openclaw security audit` reported `config.secrets.gateway_password_in_config` (warn) and `config.secrets.hooks_token_in_config` (info) for values that correctly use the documented `${ENV_VAR}` substitution syntax.

## Why This Change Was Made

The secrets-in-config collector was checking the resolved runtime config, where `${...}` placeholders had already been substituted by the config loader. This change passes the unresolved source config to `collectSecretsInConfigFindings` and uses the source value for the `looksLikeEnvRef` check, mirroring the pattern already used by `collectGatewayConfigFindings`.

## User Impact

Users who store gateway passwords and hooks tokens as `${ENV_VAR}` references no longer see false-positive audit findings. Plaintext literals in config are still flagged.

## Evidence

- Added regression tests in `src/security/audit-config-basics.test.ts` covering both env-ref suppression and continued plaintext flagging.
- Targeted test run: `pnpm test src/security/audit-config-basics.test.ts` passes.
- Real behavior proof via isolated scripts:
  - Env-ref case (`${OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PASSWORD}`, `${OPENCLAW_HOOKS_TOKEN}`): `hits: []`
  - Literal plaintext case: both `config.secrets.gateway_password_in_config` and `config.secrets.hooks_token_in_config` are emitted.
target.author: xydigit-sj
